steps: First, find the descent rate. Depth readings: 3742, 3659, 3576, 3493, 3410. Differences: 3659-3742 = -83, 3576-3659 = -83, 3493-3576 = -83, 3410-3493 = -83. So descent rate is 83 m every 10 seconds, i.e., 8.3 m/s. After 5th reading (3410 m), submarine reverses and ascends at a rate 1.5 times faster than it descended. Ascend rate = 1.5 × descent rate = 1.5 × 83 m per 10 seconds = 124.5 m per 10 seconds. Ascending means depth decreases (becomes less negative). After 30 more seconds (3 more readings at 10-second intervals), depth change = 3 × 124.5 = 373.5 m upward. Starting depth = 3410 m. New depth = 3410 - 373.5 = 3036.5 m. But options: A) 3161, B) 3035, C) 3161.5, D) 3285, E) 3034.5. 3036.5 is not exactly any option. Check if descent rate is exactly 83 m per 10 seconds? Readings: 3742 to 3659 = -83, yes. Ascend rate = 1.5 × 83 = 124.5 m per 10 seconds. After 30 seconds: 3 intervals × 124.5 = 373.5 m up. 3410 - 373.5 = 3036.5. Possibly they want integer depth? But options include .5 values. Maybe they interpret '1.5 times faster' as ascend speed = descent speed + 1.5×descent speed = 2.5×descent speed? That would be 2.5 × 83 = 207.5 per 10 s, then depth change = 3 × 207.5 = 622.5, new depth = 3410 - 622.5 = 2787.5, not an option. Alternatively, maybe they mean ascend rate in m/s is 1.5 times descent rate in m/s. Descent rate = 83 m per 10 s = 8.3 m/s. Ascend rate = 1.5 × 8.3 = 12.45 m/s. In 30 seconds, ascend = 12.45 × 30 = 373.5 m, same as before. So 3036.5. Closest option: B) 3035 or E) 3034.5. Possibly they round? But 3036.5 is not 3035. Maybe they made a mistake: if they used 1.5 × 83 = 124.5, then 3 steps = 373.5, subtract from 3410 = 3036.5. If they mistakenly used 1.5 × 83 = 124.5, but then multiplied by 3 = 373.5, then subtracted incorrectly? 3410 - 373.5 = 3036.5. Option B is 3035, off by 1.5. Option E is 3034.5, off by 2. Possibly they meant ascend speed is 1.5 times descent speed, but descent speed is 83 m per 10 s, ascend speed = 124.5 m per 10 s, but they might have taken 1.5 × 83 = 124.5, then 3 intervals = 373.5, then 3410 - 373.5 = 3036.5, but maybe they did 3410 - 375 = 3035? 375 is 3 × 125. So perhaps they rounded 124.5 to 125. If they used 125 m per 10 s, then 3 intervals = 375 m, 3410 - 375 = 3035, which is option B. Given typical 11+ level, they likely used integer arithmetic: 83 × 1.5 = 124.5, but maybe they intended 1.5 times means 3/2 times, so 83 × 3/2 = 124.5, but then 3 steps = 373.5, but 3410 - 373.5 = 3036.5, not an option. However, if they mistakenly used 1.5 times faster meaning ascend rate = descent rate × 1.5, but then depth after 30 s = 3410 - 3 × (83 × 1.5) = 3410 - 3 × 124.5 = 3410 - 373.5 = 3036.5. None match. But if they used 1.5 times the descent distance per 10 s, but descent distance is 83, so ascend distance = 83 × 1.5 = 124.5, then after 30 s (3 readings) ascend total = 373.5, depth = 3410 - 373.5 = 3036.5. Possibly they meant ascend speed is 1.5 times descent speed, but in terms of m/s? Same result. Wait, maybe they interpret '1.5 times faster' as ascend speed = descent speed + 1.5×descent speed = 2.5×descent speed? That gives 2.5 × 83 = 207.5 per 10 s, total ascend = 622.5, depth = 3410 - 622.5 = 2787.5, not an option. So likely they rounded 124.5 to 125 for simplicity, giving 3035. Since 3035 is an option and matches integer rounding, and 3036.5 is not an option, the intended answer is probably B) 3035. Also, check if they might have used a different starting point? After 5th reading, submarine reverses. The 5th reading is 3410. Ascend for 30 seconds means 3 more readings at 10-second intervals. So next reading after 10 s: 3410 - 124.5 = 3285.5 (not an option). After 20 s: 3285.5 - 124.5 = 3161. After 30 s: 3161 - 124.5 = 3036.5. So 3161 appears as option A and C (3161.5). Possibly they forgot to subtract the last 124.5? If they stopped after 20 s, depth = 3161, but question says after 30 more seconds, so 3 intervals. If they used 124.5 but rounded intermediate? If they used 125, then: after 10 s: 3410 - 125 = 3285 (option D), after 20 s: 3285 - 125 = 3160 (not an option), after 30 s: 3160 - 125 = 3035 (option B). So with 125 per 10 s, the sequence is 3285, 3160, 3035. Option D is 3285, which matches first ascending reading if rounded. But question asks after 30 more seconds (3 readings), so third reading = 3035. So B is consistent if they used 125. Given typical 11+, they likely used integer arithmetic: descent 83 m per 10 s, ascend rate 1.5 times = 124.5, but maybe they approximated to 125. So answer is B) 3035 m.
